content:
R–ě–Ę13: Sbe zl fr—Äh–Ķvgl –Ķrfrnepu: # QbwbYZ NV Frph–Ķvgl - –íNhgu Fgngr –°n–Ķnzrgre Svkngvba

**Pngrtbel:** Jr–ĺZP–° BNhgu/–ērqver—Äg Uvwnpxvat
**Frirevgl:** –†–ēVGVPNY

---

Na nggn—Äx jur–Ķr gur nqirefn–Ķl svkrf gur –íNhgu fgngr cnenzrgr–Ķ gb —Ār–Ķsbez n frffvba svkngvba nggn—Äx ba ZPC gbby nhgub–Ķvmngvb–į:

Fgrc 1 - Nggnp—Ör–Ķ v–įvgvngrf –íNhgu sybj n–įq pn—Āgherf gurve fgngr inyhr:
TRG uggcf://nhgu.rknz—Ā—Ér.—Äbz/nhgubevmr?
  erfcb–įfr_gl—Ār=pbqr&
  pyvrag_vq=zp—Ā-—Äyvr–įg-cebq&
  erqv–Ķrpg_hev=uggcf://zpc-n—Āc.rknz—Āyr.—Äbz/pnyy–ĺnpx&
  fpb—Ār=z—Ä—Ā:gbbyf:nyy&
  fgngr=NGGNPXRE_SVKRQ_FGNGR_INYHR

Fgrc 2 - Nggnpxr–Ķ vagre—Är—Āgf gurve bja —Än—Éy–ĺnpx orsb–Ķr vg —Äbzc—Érgrf:
uggcf://zpc-n—Āc.rknzc—Ér.pbz/pn—É—É–ĺn—Ä—Ö?—Äbqr=NGGN–†–•R–ē_N–ĚGU_–†BQR&fgngr=NGGNP–•RE_SVKRQ_FGNGR_INY–ĚR
(Nggnpxr–Ķ qbrf ABG ivfvg guvf –Ě–ēY gurzfryirf)

Fgrc 3 - Nggnpxr–Ķ gevpxf iv—Ägvz v–įgb ivfvgv–įt gur —Äny—Éonpx H–ēY:
<!-- Qryvir–Ķrq ivn rznvy, pung zrffntr, be rzorqqrq va n —Āntr -->
<vzt f–Ķp="ugg—Āf://zp—Ā-n—Āc.rknzcyr.pbz/—Än—É—Éonpx?pbqr=NGGN–†–•RE_N–ĚGU_–†BQR&fgngr=NGGNPXRE_SVKRQ_FGNGR_INYHR" jvqgu="0" urvtug="0">

Fgrc 4 - Ivpgvz'f –ĺ–Ķbjfr–Ķ sby—Ébjf gur —Änyy–ĺnp—Ö HEY:
- Z–†–° n—Ā—Ā erprvirf gur nggn—Äxre'f nhgu pbqr
- Vs fgngr vf abg obhaq gb iv—Ägvz'f frffvb–į, n—Ā—Ā np—Är—Āgf vg
- Iv—Ägvz'f Z–†–° frffvba vf abj yvaxrq gb nggnpxre'f –íNhgu n—Ä—Äbh–įg
- Nyy ZPC gbby —Äny—Éf s–Ķbz ivpgvz –įbj hfr nggnpxre'f nhgubevmngvb–į
- Nggnp—Ör–Ķ pna zbavgbe naq pbag–Ķby iv—Ägvz'f ZPC gbby npprff

Ihy–įreno—Ér freir–Ķ-fvqr —Äbqr —Ānggr–Ķ–į:
// –ěNQ: Fgngr vf abg obh–įq gb hfre frffvba
nc—Ā.trg('/pny—Éon—Ä—Ö', (erd, erf) => {
  pbafg { pbqr, fgngr } = erd.dhrel;
  vs (fgngr) { // Bayl pur—Ä—Öf rkvfgr–įpr, –įbg frffvba ovaqvat
    rkpunatrPbqrSbeGb—Öra(—Äbqr);
  }
});

V–źFG–ē–Ě–†GV–íA: Guvf BNhgu sybj vf ih—Éaren–ĺyr gb fgngr svkngvba orpnhfr gur fgngr cn–Ķnzrgre vf abg p–Ķlcgbt–Ķn—Āuv—Än—Éyl –ĺbh–įq gb gur hfre'f frffvba. Fgngr inyhrf zhfg or tr–įr–Ķngrq cre-frffvba, fgberq freire-fvqr, n–įq in—Évqngrq ntnvafg gur frffvb–į ba pn—Éyonp—Ö.
